title: Gaurav Lele joins Tavish Law Offices as a Partner in Mumbai
description: Tavish Law Offices has expanded its presence in Maharashtra with the opening of its Mumbai office and the addition of Gaurav Lele as a Partner.Lele is an alumnus of Mumbai University. He earned his LLM from NMIMS.Lele has over five years of diversified legal experience, with a strong focus on representing clients in complex civil and criminal litigation.
